# Sepehr Mahmoudian

> AI/ML engineer in Berlin, Germany. Builds agentic systems; works across
> continual learning, knowledge graphs and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG),
> with roots in computational neuroscience, information theory, neurorobotics and
> 3D vision. Primary languages: Rust and Python. Building on GitHub since 2014.

## Focus
Agentic engineering, continual learning, knowledge graphs, RAG, neural networks,
neurorobotics, information theory, computational neuroscience, 3D vision and scene
reconstruction, robotics.

## Selected work
- NCP — safety-gated, provenance-first wire protocol (Rust): https://github.com/sepahead/NCP
- crebain — Adaptive Response & Awareness System; sensor fusion, ML detection, drone physics, ROS/Gazebo: https://github.com/sepahead/crebain
- pid-rs — Partial Information Decomposition with continuous mutual-information estimators (Rust): https://github.com/sepahead/pid-rs
- cobot-atlas — 3D mesh-generation pipeline; dataset on Hugging Face: https://github.com/sepahead/cobot-atlas
- engram (private) — neural-modeling hub
- prisoma (private) — a Partial-Information-Decomposition "prism" for Vision-Language-Action policies

## Research & writing
- ReScience C replication — information-theoretic analysis of transfer functions: https://github.com/sepahead/mahmoudian-2020-rescience
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=t3PSg8kAAAAJ
- Substack: https://substack.com/@thetorus
